title: Chicken Quesadilla
tagline: Crispy tortilla, melty cheese, seasoned chicken. Ready in 15 minutes.
description: Flour tortillas stuffed with seasoned chicken, cheese, and peppers, cooked until golden and crispy. Serve with salsa, sour cream, and guacamole.
ingredients: Sour cream, salsa, guacamole for serving
steps: Toss shredded chicken with chili powder, cumin, garlic powder, and salt.
Heat a large skillet over medium heat. Add 1/2 Tbsp butter.
Place a tortilla in the skillet. Add 1/2 cup cheese to half the tortilla.
Top cheese with 1/4 of the chicken, peppers, and onion. Add more cheese on top.
Fold tortilla in half. Cook 2-3 minutes until bottom is golden.
Flip carefully and cook 2-3 minutes more until both sides are crispy and cheese is melted.
Repeat with remaining ingredients. Cut into triangles and serve with toppings.
notes: Crispy secret: Butter in the pan creates the best golden crust.
Cheese placement: Cheese on both sides of the filling helps everything stick together.
Rotisserie shortcut: Use store-bought rotisserie chicken for speed.
Make it veggie: Swap chicken for black beans and corn.
Keep warm: Place finished quesadillas on a baking sheet in a 200°F oven while making the rest.
